# Coverage Period

At Acme Shop, the standard warranty covers products for 12 months from the date of purchase, addressing defects in materials and workmanship under normal use. Coverage is only valid for items bought directly from Acme Shop or authorized retailers, excluding damages from misuse or wear. To claim warranty services, customers must contact customer service with their receipt and a description of the issue, which may involve shipping products for evaluation and repair. Claims are generally resolved within 14 business days, emphasizing customer satisfaction throughout the warranty process.

[Source: warranty.md#coverage-period]
